HGSS.670.0001:
You had fun battling us, right?\f
So how about we exchange phone
numbers, and that way if we want to\r
battle again, we can just give each\r
other a call? [0200,0000]
HGSS.670.0002:
All right, now you’ve got our number
and we have yours.
HGSS.670.0004:
Did you decide you wanted to trade
numbers after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.670.0005:
All right, here you go!
It’s an Oval Stone.\f
HGSS.670.0006:
Huh?
Wait, aren’t you nearby?\f
Do you just really like talking on the
phone or something? What an odd hobby.
HGSS.670.0007:
Our [0100,000A,0000] is much stronger now!\f
We were battling a [0100,000B,0000]
recently and it was over before we\r
knew it!\f
Oh yeah, by the way, this is Tia.
HGSS.670.0008:
Our [0100,000A,0000] is much stronger now!\f
We were battling a [0100,000B,0000]
recently and it was over before we\r
knew it!\f
Oh yeah, by the way, this is Kay.
HGSS.670.0009:
Earlier we saw a [0100,000B,0000] on
Route 15. Didn’t we, Tia?\f
Yeah, then suddenly a [0100,000B,0000]
came out of nowhere. Didn’t it, Kay?\f
Yeah, and we were so surprised we just
ran away. Didn’t we, Tia?\f
I keep thinking about it, Kay, and
I think that since we have Pokémon,\r
we should have just battled, right?\f
Is it hard to tell who’s who when you’re
talking to both of us on the phone?
HGSS.670.0010:
We should have another battle, just
the three of us.\f
We’re on [0104,0003,0000], so come on
over when you get the chance.
HGSS.670.0011:
Didn’t we make plans to have
another battle?\f
We’re waiting on [0104,0003,0000], so
don’t forget, OK?
HGSS.670.0012:
Well, since we’re on the phone, how
about we give you a quiz?\f
...\f
So, who’s speaking right now? Kay or
Tia?\f
...
...\r
...\r
...\r
The correct answer is...\f
Eleanor from the Pokémon Fan club,
who’s standing next to the twins!
HGSS.670.0013:
Hey, Tia found an Oval Stone.\f
We’ll give it to you if you come find us
on [0104,0003,0000]. Got it?
HGSS.670.0014:
We’re waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
We’ll give you an Oval Stone...
